title: Pi orchestrator smoke-test epic
description: Disposable tracker-only epic used to verify the Pi ticks runner command discovery, graph parsing, dry-run wave planning, worktree naming, and status output. No source implementation should be executed.
acceptance_criteria: Pi RPC discovers the ticks extension commands; /ticks-run <epic> --dry-run --worktrees reports the ready wave and deterministic branch/worktree plan; no child implementer is launched.
closed_reason: Completed: Pi RPC loaded all Ticks commands and dry-run worktree planning passed against synthetic ready tick xns; no implementer was launched.
